# Asc3nd Collective Static Preview

Purpose:
- Flyer-faithful public preview for Asc3nd Collective.
- Built from the black/gold/white youth nonprofit reference image and Asc3nd logo.
- Static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript only. No build step, no backend.

Pages:
- / (index.html) — homepage: hero, mission, programs, Stories teaser, Merch teaser, contact, footer.
- /blog.html — Stories archive: full post grid with category filter.
- /merch.html — Merch: seven-product fundraising concept.

Primary homepage sections:
- Hero — "Empowering youth. Elevating futures. Building community."
- Mission / Who we are
- Core pillars
- Program lanes
- Stories teaser (4 posts) — links to /blog.html
- Merch teaser (3 products) — links to /merch.html
- Get involved call to action
- Contact preview workflow
- Footer

Primary public action:
- Donate: https://www.givelively.org/

Navigation:
- Home: index.html#home
- About Us / Our Mission: index.html#mission
- Programs: index.html#programs
- Stories: blog.html
- Merch: merch.html
- Contact: index.html#contact
- Events: modal, coming soon
- Volunteer: modal, preview workflow

Features:
- Light/dark theme toggle (persisted, honors prefers-color-scheme).
- English / Mexican Spanish flag toggle (persisted across pages).
- Sticky header with scroll state and active-section highlight.
- Reveal-on-scroll, scroll progress bar, reduced-motion support.
- Modal focus trap (Tab/Shift+Tab), Escape / overlay / X close.

Social signup links (all open the platform signup page):
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/accounts/emailsignup/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/reg/
- X: https://x.com/i/flow/signup
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/signup
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/signup

Stories topics (original Asc3nd editorial, backdated across 30 days):
- Grant readiness for small Washington nonprofits
- Where Seattle youth programs find local funding
- Mentorship that sticks beyond the first meeting
- AI tools nonprofits actually use without losing the human touch
- Volunteer coordination that keeps people coming back
- Telling your story without exploiting the people you serve
- Pacific Northwest sponsorships: making the local business case
- Leadership through sport: why team programs build future leaders

Merch products (concept only):
- Asc3nd Signature T-shirt
- Asc3nd Crown Hat
- Asc3nd Community Hoodie
- Asc3nd Everyday Tote
- Asc3nd Sticker Pack
- Asc3nd Wall Print
- Asc3nd Camp Mug or Water Bottle

Contact workflow status:
- Preview mode only.
- Local validation only.
- Email draft and copyable summary available.
- No backend storage.
- No fake submission.

Organization:
- Asc3nd Collective, 501(c)(3) youth development nonprofit.
- EIN: 99-1881891.

Bilingual support:
- English.
- Mexican Spanish (es-MX). "Asc3nd Collective" is never translated.

Boundaries:
- No secrets.
- No internal file paths.
- No fake checkout.
- No fake Printify integration.
- No invented statistics, deadlines, or partnerships.
- Final legal/privacy review still required before production.
